item.title: Health Week: March 31 — April 06, 2026
item.description: Sleep No sleep data available this week. Activity Metric This Week Previous Week Trend Active Minutes 483.0 min — — Body Composition Metric This Week Previous Week Trend Avg Fasted Glucose ~5.0 mmol/L ~5.9 mmol/L -0.9 mmol/L Avg Ketones ~1.9 mmol/L ~1.2 mmol/L +0.7 mmol/L Weight 133.6 kg 136.8 kg -1.6 kg Nutrition No nutrition data available this week. Productivity Metric This Week Previous Week Trend Productive Time 5,476.0 min 2,401.

item.title: Introducing the Health Dashboard
item.description: Why This Exists I’ve been tracking macros and glucose readings for a while now, but it’s always been scattered — a photo here, a reading there, data spread across apps with no single picture. So I built something to fix that. This section of the site is an automated health dashboard. Every week, my data gets pulled together, formatted into a report, and published here. No manual effort once it’s running.
